sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports smoking one pack per day for 20 years. He states he wants to quit and is considering nicotine patches and meditation. He also reports occasional headaches.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 130/80 mmHg. Heart rate is 72 bpm and regular. Neurological exam is unremarkable.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a history of nicotine dependence and reports experiencing headaches.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The provider wants the patient to stop smoking. The nicotine patch dosage will be decreased over time. The doctor recommends setting a quit date. The patient will start with a 21 milligram nicotine patch. The patient is planning to join a gym. The patient is planning to start meditation. The patient will have a follow-up appointment in two weeks.
